Inspection Score Lookup

Snapshot: July 09, 2026

26,293 score records

Enter one FHA number or REMS property ID per line, e.g. 113-35926 or 800252036. Dashes and spaces don't matter — you can paste several at once and mix both types.

Don't have the FHA number?

Matches on partial, case-insensitive text. This searches the address index only — review the candidates below, then use the exact FHA number or Property ID above to pull the confirmed score. Name matches are never used as a stand-in for a real FHA/property ID match.

Matches by FHA number against the address index, then cross-references the property ID against inspection score records. No name-based matching is used. Data is a static snapshot — re-issue this file to refresh.
